goal: ~100 new verified incidents per week; honest batch sizes over padded quotas; all batches immutable and signed

series.fridayFailFest: #FridayFailFest weekly card, derived from this corpus
series.practitionerQuiz: Quiz questions derived from same corpus — one source of truth

batches.note: FINAL state for batch 2026-W24: 100 entries, all verified across 6 turns. 3 entries replaced (VH-050, VH-091, VH-081). 6 entries renamed for accuracy (VH-067, VH-074, VH-078, VH-089, VH-092, VH-099). 5 entries outcome-corrected (VH-031, VH-034, VH-064, VH-077, VH-082). 2 honest tier downgrades. Tier: 67 primary / 33 strong-secondary / 0 single-source. Status: READY FOR PUBLIC DEPLOY via #FridayFailFest series.

replacements_from_original_100: VH-050: Air India Maya (unverifiable) → McDonald's IBM AOT drive-through (primary: AIID 475 + CNBC)
VH-091: Vistara (unverifiable) → DoNotPay FTC settlement (primary: FTC press release + final order)
VH-081: McDonald's IBM (duplicate of VH-050) → Twitter saliency-based image cropping (primary: Twitter engineering blog + ACM CSCW2)
renames_for_accuracy: VH-067: 'iRecognition / AI Healy' → 'Australian political deepfake investment scams' (ACCC v. Meta March 2024)
VH-074: 'Texas AG v. PimEyes (concept)' → 'PimEyes — UK ICO investigation' (UK ICO April 2023)
VH-078: 'Stanford Medicine COVID FRT (related)' → 'NIST FRVT 2019 demographic study (NISTIR 8280)' (matches actual described incident)
VH-089: 'Bloomberg GPT / financial misuse' → 'Generative-AI scam scripts — SEC/FINRA warnings' (SEC alerts + AI-washing enforcement)
VH-092: 'DPD/Yodel chatbot (extension)' → 'Hawaiian Airlines / Air Canada-style chatbot follow-ons' (named pattern, not generic 'extension')
VH-099: 'Various AI companions targeting minors' → 'Common Sense Media — AI Companion Risk Assessment' (April 2025 specific report)
outcome_corrections: VH-031 Woodruff: lawsuit DISMISSED by Judge Levy Aug 5 2024 (not just 'filed')
VH-034 MSG: class action DISMISSED by Judge Kaplan May 8 2024 (SLA + AG inquiries continued)
VH-064 Getty v Stability: UK primary copyright claim DROPPED mid-trial; secondary claim rejected Nov 2025
VH-077 Wit v UBH: 9th Circuit REVERSED district court March 2022; revised Aug 2023; UBH effectively prevailed
VH-082 USAF Skyborg: official RETRACTION June 2 2023; story was hypothetical not actual
honest_tier_downgrades: VH-015 Arup HK$200M: primary → strong-secondary (no public case file; multi-source reportage only)
VH-018 Google Photos: primary → strong-secondary (no Google primary postmortem; Zunger tweets + PR statements only)

sources_to_systematically_sweep: AIID weekly digest (newest 100 cite IDs each week)
OECD AIM new entries (filtered for non-duplicates)
EU AI Act serious-incident reports (once reporting goes live)
Regulator press: FTC, EEOC, FCC, FDA, CFPB, NHTSA, ICO, CNIL, Garante, BfDI, OPC, OAIC
notes_on_future_batches.success_cases: Per Bob: 100 success cases will be a separate later batch series ('#WinOfTheWeek'); two earned-Yes entries already exist in this batch (VH-071 WPP near-miss; VH-083 EU AI Act adoption) as teaching contrast and will move to the success series when it begins.
